result.stdout:
USAGE: fitz [--help] [--timezones <timezones>]
            [--symbols <rectangles|mono|sunmoon>] [--tics] [--stretch]
            [--colorize] [--hours12] [--live] [--version] [--save] [<TIME>]

TIME:

    <TIME>                time to display

OPTIONS:

    --timezones <timezones>
                          timezones to display, comma-seperated (e.g.:
                          'America/New_York,Europe/London) or named
                          (Office:America/New_York,Home:Europe/London) - for TZ
                          names see TZ database name in
                          https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time
                          _zones)
    --symbols <rectangles|mono|sunmoon>
                          symbols to use for time blocks
    --tics                use local time tics on the time axis
    --stretch             stretch across the terminal at the cost of accuracy
    --colorize            colorize the symbols
    --hours12             use 12-hour clock
    --live                display time live (quit via 'q' or 'C-c'
    --version             print version and exit
    --save                save options to configuration
    --help                display this list of options.
